directives.directive: For NotchPet visual verification, prefer letting the user manually launch built artifacts. If the agent must launch ./build/NotchPet to inspect effects, it must close the app before finishing.
When shell commands involving omx/Node tooling are unavailable or fail due to Node version/PATH, try `fnm use 22.21` first, then retry the command in the same shell context.

notes.content: 2026-04-24: `eval "$(fnm env)" && fnm use 22.21` makes `omx` available at `/Users/gztd-03-01473/.local/state/fnm_multishells/.../bin/omx`. Retried `omx team 1:executor ...`; runtime failed with `Error: Team mode requires tmux. Install with: apt install tmux / brew install tmux`. So fnm fixes omx/Node PATH, but durable team still requires tmux installed and ideally a TMUX leader session.
